'''Greel screamers''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Bird/Legends|avian]] predator [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Forest/Legends|forests]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pii IV]]. They were capable of flight and had a carnivorous [[Diet/Legends|diet]]. Greel screamers resided in [[greel tree]]s, often in groups of four to eight. The avian was named for their cries when their territory was threatened. The greel screamer featured a 0.75 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] body, toothy [[Beak/Legends|beak]], and flexible wings with a wingspan of 1.5 meters. Though the [[Greel Wood Logging Corporation]] took precautions to flush the hostile avian from [[Tree/Legends|trees]] before cutting them down, attacks from greel screamers could occur during [[Logger|logging]]. This threat demanded workers to be assigned "[[crimson duty]]" to defend the others.<ref name="Greel" />

{{RPGseed}}
Sometime during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a group of individuals joined a logging crew of the Greel Wood Logging Corporation to evade [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial forces]] on Pii IV. While assisting the crew, the individuals fought off greel screamers.<ref name="Greel" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Greel screamers were mentioned in "[[The Greel Wood Haven]]," an article featured in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6|sixth issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] magazine that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[May]] of [[1995]] for their ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The article provided an adventure seed set on Pii IV<ref name="Greel" /> and this article assumes the adventure occurs as described.
